repo_purpose: Shinobi: an autonomous agent system with upstream release monitoring (Hermes watcher), CLI read/self-analysis tooling, mission configuration, keyboard-based abort handling, and path/command security validation.
architecture_summary:
## Overview
Shinobi appears to be a TypeScript-based autonomous agent framework with the following layers (inferred from readable sub-reports only):

- **src/**: Core runtime utilities including a GitHub release watcher (`hermes_watcher.ts`) for NousResearch/hermes-agent, a Windows PowerShell-based ESC kill switch, path-traversal/command safety validation, and a synchronous command runner.
- **scripts/**: Smoke tests and integration runners for CLI argument parsing (`parseReadArgs`, `parseSelfArgs`) and self-analysis workflows (`runRead`, `runSelf`, `runSelfDiff`). Scripts import from `src/reader/cli.js` and `src/reader/self.js` (note: these paths are referenced but not directly covered by the src/ sub-report).
- **missions/**: Mission configuration and runtime logic (unverified — scan timed out).
- **docs/**, **misc/**, and repo root: Unreadable due to validation failures.

## Dependencies
External deps noted are all Node.js built-ins (`node:fs`, `node:os`, `node:path`, `child_process`). No third-party runtime dependencies surfaced in readable reports.

## Gaps
Four of six sub-reports are partially or fully unreadable, so architecture coverage is incomplete.

modules.name: src
modules.responsibility: Core utilities: Hermes release watcher, ESC kill switch, path/command permission validation, synchronous command runner.

modules.name: scripts
modules.responsibility: Smoke tests and integration runners for CLI parsing and self-analysis (read/self/self-diff workflows).

modules.name: missions
modules.responsibility: Mission configuration and runtime logic for Shinobi agent tasks (contents unverified — subagent timed out).

risks.description: missions/ directory unreadable: subagent timed out at 90s on all attempts. Core mission logic not analyzed — major coverage gap.
Repo root (/) not read — validation failed twice on key_files. No top-level manifest, package.json, or license visible.
docs/ not read — validation failed twice on key_files. Documentation coverage unknown.
misc/ not read — validation failed twice on concerns field. Contents unknown.
src/utils/runner.ts uses execSync with no timeout; long-running commands freeze the entire process.
src/utils/kill_switch.ts spawns PowerShell without timeout; risk of runaway child process if the script hangs.
scripts/a4_run.ts contains hardcoded Windows paths (C:\Users\angel\...) — not portable across environments.
scripts/a4_run.ts silently swallows JSON.parse errors with empty catch blocks, masking output corruption.
src/utils/permissions.ts sensitive-path list mixes Unix and Windows entries inconsistently; cross-platform edge cases missed.
hermes_watcher.ts truncates release body to 4000 chars without indicating truncation; users unaware of omitted content.
hermes_watcher.ts polling has no rate-limit jitter; parallel instances risk GitHub API quota exhaustion.
scripts reference src/reader/cli.js and src/reader/self.js, but src/ sub-report did not enumerate a reader/ subdirectory — possible coverage gap in src report.
